steps.title: Compare sinuosity
steps.content: The notes define curviness as the ratio of stream length to valley length. They also say the Embarras River has high sinuosity and the Luni River has low sinuosity.

steps.title: State the actual comparison
steps.content: Choice A reverses the rivers' sinuosity categories. Choice C explains how curviness is determined without comparing the rivers. Choice D describes the calculation method without stating which river is curvier. The remaining choice makes the needed comparison. The answer is B.
